name: [GRIDHAND] E-commerce Agent - Abandoned cart → email reminder after 1hr → SMS after 24hr

gridhand.scenario: Abandoned cart → email reminder after 1hr → SMS after 24hr
gridhand.description: When a customer leaves items in their online shopping cart at a retail store like Trendy Fashion Boutique, a workflow is triggered that sends a reminder email to the customer through Mailchimp after one hour, prompting them to complete their purchase. If the customer still hasn't checked out after 24 hours, the workflow automatically sends a personalized SMS reminder through Twilio, urging them to finalize their purchase and offering a limited-time discount to incentivize completion. By doing so, the business owner can recover potentially lost sales and increase revenue, with the automated workflow helping to re-engage customers and reduce cart abandonment rates.
